behavior: Active, acrobatic foliage gleaner; hops and hangs among twigs, and may carry large seeds to a perch to open them.
field_marks: Large dark eyes and a short, stout dark bill
Small black patch immediately above the bill
Warm rusty-peach wash along the flanks
habitat: Mature deciduous and mixed woodlands, wooded parks, orchards, and tree-rich gardens.

sources.title: Tufted Titmouse Identification — All About Birds
